entity.label: Zabdiel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: An overseer of the priests after the Captivity (Neh. 11:14).

nodes.label: Zabdiel
nodes.description: An overseer of the priests after the Captivity (Neh. 11:14).

verses.text: And their brethren, mighty men of valour, an hundred twenty and eight: and their overseer was Zabdiel, the son of one of the great men.
